subtitle: Early-Bird Presale | All-Units Mega Bundle
short_description: Early-bird presale for the complete CIE 0580 all-units package. Includes 9 units, 18 sections, and 124 subtopics in one roadmap. L1 singles total US$372; L4 early-bird US$89 (save US$283).
description_markdown:
This is the early-bird presale for the **CIE 0580 All-Units Mega Bundle**.

### What this mega bundle covers
- **9 units**
- **18 sections**
- **124 subtopics**
- A full exam-board structured progression path

### Value positioning (L1 anchor: US$3 each)
- L1 single-buy subtotal for this board: **US$372** (124 x US$3)
- L4 early-bird price: **US$89**
- Savings at early-bird price: **US$283**.

### What you receive now (presale stage)
- Presale entitlement confirmation for full-board access
- Early-bird price lock for all-units package
- Board-level release updates and rollout notifications

### What you receive on release (May 31, 2026)
- All listed unit bundles for this board
- Unit-level worksheets and answer support
- Kahoot-aligned structured progression across topics
- Cross-unit extension roadmap and bundled upgrade logic

### Early-bird window
- Early-bird ends: **April 30, 2026**
- Official release: **May 31, 2026**

### Retention and bonus value
- Includes themed past-paper analysis, free bilingual vocabulary cards, and returning-buyer upgrade coupons.
- Need-based bilingual support path is available after purchase (not review-gated).

### Policy notes
- Presale terms are listed in the product page and project terms PDF.
- Dates are absolute and promises follow the listed release schedule.
